title: anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. brevifolium
intro: Anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. brevifolium, also known as the short-leafed anarrhinum, is a shrub-like plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. brevifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Anarrhinum fruticosum subsp. brevifolium can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
